patch.value: Server prints false success and hangs on EADDRINUSE (Express 5 listen callback receives the error)

Found during 2026-06-12 fleet verification (companion task pm-cli-website-wwrz). Express 5 once()-wraps the app.listen callback and installs it as the server error handler (express/lib/application.js:598-606). src/server.ts:88 ignored the callback argument, so on EADDRINUSE pm-web printed 'pm-web running on :PORT' while owning zero sockets and idled forever; pm web never exited non-zero. Fix: callback now checks (err) and exits 1 with a clear message; an additional server.on('error') handler covers post-bind errors. A/B proven: HEAD on occupied port -> false success + hang (timeout exit 124); fixed build -> 'Failed to bind :4177: listen EADDRINUSE' exit 1; success path unchanged.
Starting pm-web on an occupied port exits 1 with a clear bind error; success path prints running message and serves traffic

value.note: listen callback err handling + server error handler

patch.value: Fixed and A/B-proven locally against a throwaway Postgres + port squatter; tests 0 fail; ships with the --ignore-scripts publish alignment
